overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through the neon-lit streets of Night City. The journey begins on a sunlit sidewalk under an elevated highway, crosses a street, passes through a dark service alley with food stalls, and emerges into a bustling downtown district filled with holographic advertisements and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway sidewalk with digital advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk under the elevated highway, passing a digital billboard and newsstand

notable_agents.action: homeless person sitting against the concrete wall next to trash bags

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass casting shadow on the sidewalk
tall digital advertisement screen displaying an anime character in purple and white outfit
metal rack structure filled with magazines and newspapers
multi-story residential building with distinctive teal and black facade
large red neon sign reading 'Hometown' visible in the distance above buildings
green painted metal railing separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath an elevated highway structure in bright midday sun. A large digital billboard displaying an anime character stands prominently ahead, while a magazine newsstand occupies the right foreground. A lone figure sits against the wall to the left as the camera moves steadily forward through the urban environment.

events.description: turns left and steps off the sidewalk to cross the street toward the underpass
enters the deep shadow of the elevated highway underpass

agents.ego_description: turns left to cross the street and approaches the dark underpass entrance with a concrete ramp

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving past on the street from left to right

entered.detail: steep concrete ramp leading up to the highway overpass with graffiti on the sides
street food vendor stall with green umbrellas and metal counter
green metal railings lining the edge of the ramp structure
angular dark building with horizontal lines and reflective windows

segments.scene_description: The player turns left to cross the asphalt street, passing a red sports car driving by. The environment transitions from bright sunlight to deep shadow as they approach and enter a concrete ramp leading under the highway structure. A food stall with green umbrellas becomes visible on the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered service alley with neon signage

events.description: enters the dark covered alleyway beneath the highway with neon-lit walls

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit service alley with neon signs and fire escapes on the walls

entered.detail: large pink neon sign in the shape of a cat's head mounted on the building facade
external metal and concrete fire escape stairs attached to the building
tall concrete walls of the service alley creating an enclosed corridor
row of vending machines with glowing screens against the wall

segments.scene_description: Moving through a narrow, shadowed service alley illuminated by neon signs. Concrete fire escapes line the right wall, and a food stall with green umbrellas recedes into the background on the left. The atmosphere is dark and enclosed compared to the previous open street, with vending machines visible against the walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense downtown commercial district with holographic advertisements

events.description: exits the dark alley into the bright open downtown area with heavy neon signage
emerges from shadow back into direct sunlight while neon signs remain visible

agents.ego_description: walking through the bustling downtown area, observing the neon signs, parked vehicles, and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians standing and conversing near parked cars on the sidewalk
man in green pants standing with arms crossed near a storefront with metal shutters

entered.detail: large concrete parking structure with multiple open levels and parked vehicles
massive vertical billboard displaying 'RYUJIN' advertisement with a portrait
various futuristic vehicles parked along the street including sedans and trucks
tall palm tree growing from a planter in the middle of the urban environment
metal roll-down shutters covering storefronts with graffiti tags
traditional red paper lanterns hanging under the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark alley into a vibrant, sunlit downtown intersection filled with holographic billboards and neon signs. The iconic 'Hometown' club sign dominates the view ahead, while parked cars line the streets and pedestrians gather on the sidewalks. The camera continues through this dense commercial district, passing various storefronts, a multi-story parking garage, and large advertising billboards.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sunlit urban sidewalk through a shadowed service alley and into a vibrant, neon-lit downtown district. It begins beneath an elevated highway in bright midday sun, moving past a magazine newsstand and a large anime billboard toward a concrete street. As the camera turns left to cross the asphalt, the bright light fades into deep shadow upon entering a concrete ramp and a narrow service alley lined with fire escapes and neon-lit vending machines. The scene then shifts from this enclosed, dark corridor as the camera emerges back into the brilliant light of a bustling intersection. Finally, the view expands across a dense commercial hub filled with holographic billboards and parked cars, moving past a multi-story parking garage toward the prominent Hometown club sign.
